title: Bows to Guns - Fortnite
description: Changes crossbows and bows to be Fortnite-styled guns.
body:
![Bows to Guns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JRaY4hPQ/images/6f7a9a5f709390bb6580514538b1c3edddc78627.png)

# 📃 Overview
**Bows to Guns - Fortnite** replaces the bow and crossbow with models based on Fortnite weapons. Currently, it features the **Submachine Gun** and **Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle**, along with reskinning golden apples to **Med Kits**.

This resource pack includes an overlay that appears only when equipped:

![Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JRaY4hPQ/images/da91fb2370bcd7b28e956d4e27a7f8f664dbba1f.png)

If you're looking for the old version of this project, **Bunches O' Guns**, you can find it [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-to-guns-fortnite/version/0).

This is an **unofficial fan-made pack** with **no affiliation to Epic Games.**

# 📂 Items
These are the current items in the latest version. Older versions may contain different weapons.

### Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle
- Replaces **Crossbow**
- **Functional optic**: best used 20–60 blocks away (ideal range: 30–40)
- Animation: Bolting the rifle

### Submachine Gun
- Replaces **Bow**
- Animation: Aiming down sights

### Med Kit + Enchanted Med Kit
- Replaces **Golden Apple** and **Enchanted Golden Apple**

### Bullet
- Replaces **Arrow**
- Uses a universal gray, "neutral" bullet since multiple guns wouldn’t realistically share ammo

# 📦 Other Packs
You can find my other projects on my [profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheMaster223).
